title: Classic Improvements Betas/OLD Back ups
description: This for preserving these versions of CIMS from Beta and premodrinth these aren't modified too
body:
# Classic Improvements BETAS AND OLD BACK UPS 

This is for persevering this old versions that have stuff not backed up by me and for you guys to see what the older days CIMS was there's a beta prelease in there to

## NOTES

**NOT ALL BETA PRELEASE VERISONS WILL BE RECOVERED INCLUDEING V1.0 to V1.7**

**YOU MAY DIG AROUND IN THESE'S BUT YOU MAY NOT REUPLOAD THESE'S**

NORMAL BETA BUILD LIKE CIMS 2.1 BETA WILL STILL BE KEPT THERE!

**If you want normal Classic improvements [here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)**
